welcome: Welcome to the SPU student and staff portal.
loginLead: Enter your credentials to open your role dashboard.
registerLead: Complete your student profile: department, academic year, and study level. Each student is linked to one department.

registerDeptInfo.INFO_ENG: Software systems, networks, embedded systems, and information technology engineering.
registerDeptInfo.MED_ENG: Medical devices, diagnostics, and healthcare technology systems.
registerDeptInfo.ALT_ENERGY_ENG: Power generation, renewable energy, efficiency, and sustainable engineering.
registerDeptInfo.ANESTHESIA: Perioperative care, anesthesia techniques, and surgical patient monitoring.
registerDeptInfo.ADMIN_SCI: Management, accounting, economics, and organizational leadership.
registerDeptInfo.PHARMACY: Pharmaceutical sciences, clinical pharmacy, and medication safety.
registerDeptInfo.ENGLISH_LIT: Linguistics, literature, translation, and professional communication.

haveAccountLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
homeHeroSubtitle: Your unified digital gateway for news, the library, grades, and student services — built for SPU students and staff.
homeAboutBody: SPU (Shamal Private University) is committed to quality education across engineering, health sciences, humanities, and administrative programs. This portal connects our community to academic resources and university life in one place.
homeOfferGradesDesc: View exam results and track your academic progress by semester.
homeOfferCoursesDesc: See registered courses and department offerings in one dashboard.
homeOfferLibraryDesc: Read and download PDF books by department from anywhere.
homeOfferAppealsDesc: Submit formal appeals on published results when needed.
homeNewsEmpty: No announcements yet. Check back soon.
